top_signals.title: CNBC UK Exchange newsletter: A UK 'wealth tax' is fraught with complications
top_signals.summary: Labour's Wes Streeting wants to raise the rate at which capital gains are taxed into line with the higher and top rates of income tax.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
